sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/entry_ad, dismiss the popup ad that appears, then read the page content

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Entry Ad Page
workflow.description: The entry ad page has loaded, and a modal dialog is present.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/entry_ad
If a button with text 'Close' is visible

workflow.name: Main Content Page
workflow.description: The ad has been dismissed, and the main page content is now visible.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/entry_ad
If a heading with text 'This is a modal window' is visible
actions: Terminate: The ad is dismissed and the main content is visible.
